---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for SONE
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

Got an idea for SONE? Let's hear it.

## What's the problem you're trying to solve?

<!-- What's missing today, or what's a little frustrating about the current experience? Even a rough sketch of the pain helps. -->

## What would you like to see?

<!-- Describe the feature or change you'd love to have. Mockups, screenshots from other apps, or "kind of like X but for Y" are all welcome. -->

## Anything else you've considered?

<!-- Other approaches you thought about, workarounds you're using today, or reasons this might be tricky. -->

## Extra context

<!-- Links, references, related Tidal API docs, anything that adds color. -->

## One last thing

- [ ] I had a quick look through [existing issues](https://github.com/lullabyX/sone/issues?q=is%3Aissue) and didn't see this one already suggested.
